mapper.select: SELECT JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER AS jobQuestionNumber, JOB_QUESTION_CONTENT AS jobQuestionContent FROM TBL_JOB_RECOMMEND_QUESTION WHERE JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER = #{jobQuestionNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{value} AND USER_TYPE = '일반회원'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_JOB_RESULT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_JOB_RESULT ( JOB_RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, JOB_RESULT_STATUS, JOB_RESULT_CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{jobResultNumber}, #{userNumber}, '진행중', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TBL_JOB_RESULT_ANSWER ( JOB_RESULT_NUMBER, JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER, JOB_QUESTION_CONTENT_SNAPSHOT, ANSWER_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{jobResultNumber}, #{jobQuestionNumber}, #{jobQuestionContentSnapshot}, #{answerContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT JOB_NUMBER AS jobNumber, JOB_NAME AS jobName FROM TBL_JOB_GROUP WHERE JOB_NUMBER BETWEEN 1 AND 4 ORDER BY JOB_NUMBER ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, TO_CHAR(CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS compPageDate, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat1IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat2IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat3IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat4IsHiring FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, MIN(FILE_NUMBER) AS FILE_NUMBER FROM TBL_FILE GROUP BY COMPANY_NUMBER ) FM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = FM.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON FM.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_STATE = '승인' ORDER BY CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE DESC, C.COMPANY_NUMBER DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.POST_NUMBER AS postNumber, P.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, U.USER_ID AS userId, TO_CHAR(P.POST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS postDate, TO_CHAR(P.EDIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS editDate FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'FREE_POST' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.POST_NUMBER AS postNumber, P.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, U.USER_ID AS userId, TO_CHAR(P.POST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS postDate, P.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, P.ANSWER_STATUS AS answerStatus FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT EXPO_NUMBER AS expoNumber, EXPO_NAME AS expoName, TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate, LOCATION AS location, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM TBL_EXPO WHERE END_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY START_DATE ASC, EXPO_NUMBER ASC
